seo.title: FAQ — Nexa Paraguay
seo.description: Answers to our 15 most common questions about process, pricing and programs.

hero.headline: Frequently asked questions
hero.subheadline: The answers our clients ask about most often.

items.q: How long does the whole process take?
items.a: In-person in one day. Issuance: 45–60 days. Company + bank: 2–4 weeks. Total: 8–12 weeks.

items.q: How many trips do I need?
items.a: One trip is sufficient.

items.q: What does the price include?
items.a: Professional fees, VAT, official taxes, bank coordination, real-estate tour and integrated advisory. No additional fees.

items.q: What is NOT included?
items.a: International flights, accommodation, personal expenses, sworn translations and apostilles in your country of origin.

items.q: Do I need to speak Spanish?
items.a: No. Our team accompanies you and communicates in Dutch, English and German.

items.q: Can a foreigner open a bank account?
items.a: Yes. It is the most complex step; we prepare your financial profile and coordinate directly with the bank.

items.q: What type of company is incorporated?
items.a: Our legal team recommends the most suitable structure (typically EAS or SA).

items.q: Is the process 100% legal?
items.a: Absolutely. Strict adherence to Paraguayan and international regulations.

items.q: What if a document is missing?
items.a: We detect it before your trip. Our pre-validation ensures you arrive fully prepared.

items.q: Do you guarantee bank approval?
items.a: The decision is the bank's. We guarantee professional preparation and institutional coordination.

items.q: Can I bring my family?
items.a: Yes. Each family member requires their own residency process.

items.q: How is payment made?
items.a: Upfront by bank transfer. No additional fees.

items.q: Can I get only the residency?
items.a: Programs are integrated by design. Contact us for your specific case.

items.q: What happens after year one (Investor)?
items.a: We present a continuation proposal tailored to your needs.

items.q: What if laws change during my process?
items.a: We monitor the regulatory environment and inform you immediately of any relevant changes.

booking.title: Book your consultation
booking.subtitle: Pick a time that works for you.

hero.headline: Privacy policy
hero.subheadline: How we collect and process your data. GDPR-compliant.

items.q: What data do we collect?
items.a: Name, email, phone (optional), country, program interest and stated objective, when you submit a form.

items.q: What do we use it for?
items.a: Only to answer your inquiry and, if you explicitly opt in, to send relevant information by email.

items.q: With whom do we share it?
items.a: CRM (HubSpot) and email provider (Mailchimp) under data-processing agreements. We never sell or share data with third parties for marketing.

items.q: How long do we keep it?
items.a: 24 months after last contact, unless required by law.

items.q: How do I exercise my rights?
items.a: Email hola@nexaparaguay.com and we respond within 30 days (access, rectification, deletion, portability).
